def negative_pandas_inplace_false_reassignment_missing():
    rule_id = "pandas_inplace_false_reassignment_missing"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "DataFrame-transform methods are called without reassignment or inplace=True, silently discarding results."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
